enrico has been a minor for 40 years

in the first stage of extraction miners
use drills to make strategic holes in

they then run diamond braid cords
through these holes cutting the marble
into a block
the machinery is kept wet to protect the
marble as chainsaws help detach the

an average block is 12 cubic meters and
can weigh 36 metric tons
it's then carefully loaded into a truck
which brings it to a processing facility
here the calacatta marble blocks are
sliced into slabs
at this stage processors can't afford to
make a mistake and risk ruining the rare
marble delivered to them
they mount over 100 very thin blades
onto a wet saw and the cutting begins

the saw cut slabs as thin as two

then they're prepared for shaping and

the slabs are first sanded and
pre-smoothed
then they're prepared for resonation or
the application of resin to fill any

it's also used to attach broken pieces

and with marble as rare as calcutta one
mistake can have a big impact on the

after sergio checks that the resin was

these steps ensure that the slab has no

stage
it's honed and polished until it almost
